title: Line Incharge
description:
Job Description




Department: Coin Blanking Division Mech Maintenance Location: Hisar Reporting To: Mr. Dharmendra Singh Experience Required: 3-5 Years Industry: Jindal Stainless limited.

---

Company Overview:

Jindal Stainless Limited is one of India’s largest and most respected stainless steel manufacturers. With a strong emphasis on operational excellence, innovation, and sustainability, we serve diverse sectors ranging from infrastructure and automotive to consumer durables. We are seeking a dynamic and detail-oriented professional to join our Coin Blanking team in the role of Shift in charge Mechanical Maintenance.

---

Job Purpose:

To ensure uninterrupted, safe, and efficient operation of press shop equipment by leading mechanical maintenance activities during the assigned shift, minimizing breakdowns, and maintaining machines at optimal performance.

---

Key Responsibilities:

Maintenance Operations

· Supervise and execute preventive, predictive, and breakdown maintenance of press shop machines (mechanical presses, feeders, conveyors, decoilers).

· Troubleshoot and rectify mechanical faults related to clutches, brakes, gearboxes, bearings, lubrication systems, hydraulics & pneumatics.

· Ensure machine availability as per production plan and reduce unplanned downtime.

· Coordinate with production team for planned maintenance and changeovers

Team Leadership

· Lead and manage technicians and fitters during the shift.

· Allocate jobs, monitor work quality, and ensure adherence to maintenance standards.

· Provide on-the-job training and guidance to technicians.

Safety & Compliance

· Ensure strict compliance with safety standards, LOTO, PPE usage, and statutory norms.

· Conduct safety checks before machine release after maintenance.

· Participate in safety audits, risk assessments, and incident investigations.

Spare Parts & Documentation

· Monitor spares consumption,

· Maintain maintenance logs, breakdown reports, checklists, and shift handover records.

· Support root cause analysis (RCA) and implementation of corrective & preventive actions (CAPA).

Continuous Improvement

· Participate in Kaizen, TPM, PM pillar activities, and cost-reduction initiatives.

· Suggest modifications and improvements to enhance machine reliability and safety.

· Support installation, commissioning, and trials of new equipment or modifications.

---

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

· Machine uptime and availability

· Breakdown frequency & MTTR

· Preventive maintenance compliance

· Safety incidents (Zero Accident target)

· Spare cost control

Qualifications & Experience:

Diploma in Mechanical Engineering

5–8 years of experience in mechanical maintenance, preferably in Press Shop / Automotive Manufacturing

Hands-on experience with high-tonnage presses and automation

---

Key Skills & Competencies:

· Strong knowledge of press shop mechanical systems

· Breakdown analysis and troubleshooting skills

· Leadership and team-handling ability

· Good communication and coordination skills

· Familiarity with TPM, safety standards, and maintenance documentation

---

Physical & Work Conditions

· Shop-floor based role

· Willingness to work in rotational shifts

· Exposure to noise, oil, and industrial environment

---

Why Join Us?

At Jindal Stainless, we believe in empowering our people, promoting continuous learning, and providing opportunities to grow within the organization. This role offers high-growth environment within the steel manufacturing sector.

title: Lead
description:
Job Description
Job Title: Associate Manager – Production Planning & Control (SPD)

Location: Hisar, Haryana
Company: Jindal Stainless Limited (JSL)

Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced Production Planning & Control (PPC) professional to manage end-to-end production planning, SAP order execution, inventory control, and dispatch coordination for SPD operations. The role requires strong expertise in SAP (PP/MM/SD), production planning, logistics coordination, and MIS reporting to ensure timely order fulfillment and operational efficiency.

Key Responsibilities
Production Planning & Scheduling
Monitor Work-in-Progress (WIP), material availability, and order prioritization using SAP.
Develop and execute daily/weekly production plans aligned with business requirements.
Track production progress and ensure on-time order completion.
Identify and resolve production planning bottlenecks through cross-functional coordination.
SAP Order Management & System Execution
Create, release, and confirm production orders in SAP / Apriso.
Manage material postings, batch management, and stock updates in SAP.
Ensure data accuracy and system compliance across SAP PP/MM/SD modules.
Perform system-based weight tracking and inventory reconciliation.
Inventory & Material Management
Monitor inventory levels, stock status, and batch movements.
Ensure optimal material availability for uninterrupted production.
Maintain accurate real-time inventory data in ERP systems.
Dispatch Planning & Logistics Coordination
Plan and execute daily dispatch schedules based on customer demand and logistics availability.
Coordinate container planning for export and domestic shipments.
Create Outbound Deliveries (OBD) in SAP for dispatch execution.
Ensure accurate documentation for shipments (containers/trucks).
MIS Reporting & Data Analysis
Prepare and publish daily MIS reports, dispatch reports, OBD reports, and order status reports.
Generate weekly and monthly performance reports for management review.
Analyze production delays, dispatch gaps, and process deviations.
Recommend corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) to improve efficiency.
Stakeholder & Cross-functional Coordination
Collaborate with Production, Sales, Supply Chain, and Logistics teams.
Ensure alignment between production planning, order fulfillment, and dispatch schedules.
Drive effective communication and follow-ups for timely execution.
Required Skills & Competencies
Expertise in SAP ERP (PP, MM, SD modules)
Strong knowledge of Production Planning, PPC, Dispatch Planning, Logistics Management
Experience in Container Planning, Export/Import Logistics
Advanced MS Excel skills (VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables, MIS Reporting, Data Analysis)
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills
Effective stakeholder management and communication skills
Preferred Qualifications
B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Metallurgy / Industrial Engineering
MBA in Operations / Supply Chain Management (preferred)
Experience Required
5–8 years of experience in Production Planning & Control / PPC / Supply Chain / Manufacturing Operations
Experience in Steel / Metals / Heavy Manufacturing industry preferred
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Production Plan Adherence (%)
On-Time Delivery (OTD)
Dispatch Adherence & OBD Closure
Inventory Accuracy (%)
Reduction in Production & Dispatch Delays

title: Lead
description:
Job Description

Group Company: Jindal Stainless Limited (JSL)

Designation: Lead – Projects (Mechanical – Engineering & Execution) – CRD

Office Location: Hisar

Sector: Steel / Manufacturing – Cold Rolling Division (CRD)

Position description: The role is responsible for leading mechanical engineering and execution activities for Cold Rolling Division projects, including erection, installation, and commissioning of critical equipment such as 20-Hi mills and HBA lines. The incumbent will ensure adherence to project timelines, quality standards, and safety practices while coordinating with cross-functional teams and external stakeholders for seamless project execution.

Primary Responsibilities: Lead and supervise mechanical erection and commissioning activities for cold rolling projects. Ensure proper installation, alignment, and commissioning of 20-Hi mills and HBA lines. Manage and troubleshoot hydraulic systems to ensure optimal performance and reliability. Review engineering drawings, layouts, and technical specifications. Coordinate with electrical, automation, production, and maintenance teams. Monitor project timelines, quality standards, and safety compliance. Liaise with vendors, contractors, and internal stakeholders for smooth execution. Identify and resolve technical issues during installation and commissioning phases. Manage contractor activities and ensure effective execution at site. Prepare and maintain project documentation, reports, and progress updates while ensuring adherence to safety standards and practices.

Skills: Strong knowledge of hydraulic systems. Experience in 20-Hi mill and HBA line erection and commissioning. Ability to read and interpret mechanical drawings and layouts. Expertise in troubleshooting and root cause analysis. Experience in project execution and contractor coordination. Knowledge of industrial safety standards and practices. Good communication and team handling skills.

Competencies: Leadership and team management. Problem-solving and analytical thinking. Planning and execution excellence. Stakeholder management. Decision-making ability. Result orientation. Adaptability and accountability.

Required work experience

Years of experience: 8–12 years of relevant experience in mechanical project execution within steel/cold rolling industry

title: Shift Incharge
description: Position description: We are seeking a skilled and experienced professional to oversee and manage the shift operations of the Rolling Mills department at Jindal Stainless Limited. The role demands a proactive leader who can ensure smooth shift operations, maintain production efficiency, and uphold stringent safety and quality standards in a fast-paced mining and metals environment. The ideal candidate will coordinate with cross-functional teams, troubleshoot operational issues, and drive continuous improvement initiatives to meet production targets and company objectives.

title: Associate
description:
Job Description

Line Maintenance & Operations:




1) Ensure smooth operation and preventive maintenance of Pull Through Annealing Furnace, 4 Hi Rolling Mill, Grinding Machines, Slitting Lines, Packaging Line, and Pump House & EOT Cranes Maintenance.

2) Monitor equipment performance and coordinate with maintenance teams for breakdown and preventive maintenance activities.

3) Ensure optimum line productivity, quality, and safety compliance.




Maintenance Planning & Execution:

1) Plan and execute preventive and predictive maintenance schedules to minimize downtime.

2) Support major shutdown activities and coordinate with OEM/service providers for maintenance and upgrades.




SAP System Management:

Work on SAP ERP modules including SAP MM (Materials Management) and SAP PM (Plant Maintenance) for:




a) Maintenance planning

b) Spare parts management

c) Work order creation and tracking

d) Material requisitions




Quality & Management Systems:

1) Ensure compliance with ISO Standards and Total Productive Maintenance (TPM) practices.

2) Implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance equipment reliability and production efficiency.




Audit Management:

1) Participate in internal and external audits related to ISO, TPM, and quality systems.

2) Prepare documentation, records, and corrective action reports to ensure audit compliance.




Process Improvement:

1) Analyze line performance data to identify improvement opportunities.

2) Implement process optimization, defect reduction, and productivity improvement initiatives.




Safety & Compliance:

1) Ensure adherence to plant safety standards and operational procedures.

2) Promote safe working practices during maintenance and production activities.




Coordination & Reporting:

1) Coordinate with production, quality, and maintenance teams to ensure smooth plant operations.

2) Prepare maintenance reports, downtime analysis, and improvement plans for management review.




Required Skills & Knowledge




1) Strong knowledge of mechanical maintenance and troubleshooting.

2) Experience with Hydraulic Systems and industrial equipment.

3) Hands-on experience with SAP ERP (MM & PM modules).

4) Understanding of **ISO Standards and Total Productive Maintenance (TPM).

5) Knowledge of rolling mill and finishing line equipment

6) Experience in shutdown maintenance and plant audits.

7) Strong problem-solving, coordination, and documentation skills.
